data.body: CI Verified -1 on first push was a PRE-EXISTING main breakage (NOT my epic): the idea->IDEA reconciler mapping made test_fetcher_unmapped_status.py stale (expects IDEA unmapped). Root-cause confirmed. Main was fixed within minutes by 5e0670c2c 'test(reconciler): use an unmapped Jira status (not IDEA)'; main advanced b1927e2a->c8965653a (4 commits, ZERO overlap with my stack). Rebased+re-greened the 11-commit stack onto c8965653a, verified reconciler+greening tests pass locally, re-pushed to Gerrit (patchset 2, changes 356-366). Verified should now pass on the fixed base. Monitoring to submit the tip 366 when all 11 are +1/+1.
